content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(mod_monolith)
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL")
H: traffic(modest) ∧ split(post_release) ⇒ prefer(fast_ship)
P: low_ops → monolith_now
R: ! premature_split ∧ ! over_engineer
A: shared_pg ∧ slice_ready_modules

[AUDIT]
Goal: decide(modular_monolith).
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL").
Hypothesis: traffic(modest) and split(post_release) implies prefer(fast shipping).
Plan: low ops then ship modular_monolith now.
Risk: high-risk premature_split and high-risk over_engineer.
Answer target: shared PostgreSQL and split-ready modules.
